titles.en: Chapter on Justice and Injustice in Bequests
Chapter on Justice and Injustice in Bequests

segments: : "مَنْ عَدَلَ فِي وَصِيَّتِهِ كَانَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ مَنْ تَصَدَّقَ بِهَا فِي حَيَاتِهِ وَ مَنْ جَارَ فِي وَصِيَّتِهِ لَقِيَ اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ وَ هُوَ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضٌ".
arabic.text: : "مَنْ عَدَلَ فِي وَصِيَّتِهِ كَانَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ مَنْ تَصَدَّقَ بِهَا فِي حَيَاتِهِ وَ مَنْ جَارَ فِي وَصِيَّتِهِ لَقِيَ اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ وَ هُوَ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضٌ".

segments:
Hadith.5419 - Harun ibn Muslim narrated from Masadah ibn Ṣadaqah from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
"Whoever is just in his will is like one who gave it in charity during his lifetime.
But whoever is unjust in his will shall meet Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, on the Day of Judgment while He (swt) turns away from him."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5419 - Harun ibn Muslim narrated from Masadah ibn Ṣadaqah from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
"Whoever is just in his will is like one who gave it in charity during his lifetime.
But whoever is unjust in his will shall meet Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, on the Day of Judgment while He (swt) turns away from him."

narratorChain.raw: 5419 - رَوَى هَارُونُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ مَسْعَدَةَ بْنِ صَدَقَةَ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
